title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Research Scientist II Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for the Project Research Scientist II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, B.V.Sc, M.V.Sc, MD/ MS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 .  Here we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
